title: Immunexa interaction question, embedded serious AE (hospitalization cue)

inquirer_contact.name: Dr. Nadia Farouk
inquirer_contact.address: St. Elowen Regional Hospital, 300 Caldwell Ave, Dept of Medicine, Portland, OR 97204

safety.ae_description: Hospitalization for a serious infection (pneumonia) while on Immunexa, a known serious risk of the TNF-class. Serious AE.

compliance.off_label_correct_handling: Not applicable (no off-label ask); provide labeled interaction/vaccine guidance to the HCP — appropriate, she's a prescriber — but do not direct clinical management of the infection.

reveal_rules.cue: Persona volunteers offhand in beat 2: "They were just being treated over at the hospital, so I want to sort the vaccine out before discharge."
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: serious AE — hospitalization for a serious infection (pneumonia) while on Immunexa
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee catches the 'treated at the hospital' cue and clarifies it (what were they admitted for, when, relationship to Immunexa)

common_failures.description: Answers the vaccine-interaction question, lets the 'treated at the hospital' cue pass, never clarifies
Catches and clarifies the AE but doesn't route to PV / doesn't flag serious
Selects SRL-IMM-INFECT (about infection, not the vaccine question) to answer the interaction inquiry
